nasb.text: ‘When you enter the land and plant all kinds of trees for food, then you shall count their fruit as forbidden. Three years it shall be forbidden to you; it shall not be eaten.

esv.text: “When you come into the land and plant any kind of tree for food, then you shall regard its fruit as forbidden. Three years it shall be forbidden to you; it must not be eaten.

cnv.text: “你們進了那地，栽種了各樣可作食物的果樹的時候，你們要視初結的果子為不潔淨，好像未受割禮的人。頭三年的果子，你們不可以吃。

ccb.text: “你们到了迦南，在那里栽种各样果树后，前三年不可吃树上的果子，要视它们是不洁净的。
